title: BEM-849 dispatch after writer
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 10:26 (UTC+3)'
prompt=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem849_request_validated_claude_response.md')
prompt.write_text('# BEM-849 | REQUEST VALIDATED CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide a real response for multi-agent architecture strategy agreement. The response file must be `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem848_claude_response.md`. It must include exact marker `CLAUDE RESPONSE` and a line `Decision: APPROVED` or `Decision: CHANGE_REQUIRED` or `Decision: BLOCKED`. Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem849_validated_claude_response_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-849 dispatch after response writer validator contract','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-849','status':'validated_claude_response_dispatch_queued','prompt':str(prompt),'queue_file':str(q),'next_action':'fresh tick then verify validator result / real Claude response','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem849_dispatch_after_writer_contract.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem849_dispatch_after_writer_contract.md').write_text('# BEM-849 | Dispatch After Writer Contract | QUEUED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick then verify validator result and real Claude response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-849'+sep+sep+'Status: validated Claude response dispatch queued. Next: tick and verify.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(prompt),str(q),'governance/state/bem849_dispatch_after_writer_contract.json','governance/reports/bem849_dispatch_after_writer_contract.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Queued Claude dispatcher after strengthening response writer contract and created a precise prompt requiring CLAUDE RESPONSE marker and Decision line')
"""
No issue comments.
